title: Belaco Oil Filled Radiators 11 Fins Portable Electric Heater Adjustable Thermostat Control 3 Heat Settings Portable Heater Overheat Protection 2500W Energy Efficient Heavy-Duty Castor
features: 【BELACO OIL FILLED HEATER】The 11 Oil filled fins heat up instantly and gives you immediate heat after you put it on, it is portable and lightweight. Easy to use and easy to maintain.

【3 HEAT SETTINGS】 This heater comes with 3 heat settings ranging from 100W/1500W/2500W, you can simply plug the heater into the Main socket and choose the heat setting as you prefer. This Heater comes with adjustable thermostat control for comfort use
【SLEEK】Elegant Black oil filled radiator which will match with any interior colour of your house. It heats the room without taking up too much space. This heater is perfect for any home or office

【COMPACT 】this heater is very light to carry and comes with built-in integral carry handle makes it ideal to carry around wherever you need. This heater comes with Heavy duty castor which is easy to manoeuvre the heater without carrying it (To prevent any accidental damaged, please don't move the heater when its ON)
【 SAFE TO USE】 This heater comes with Safety Tip Over switch protection which would cut off the power of the heater if it’s knocked over or tilts too far
description: Product Description Fast heat up Improved convection heating elements allowing air inside a convector heater to heat up quicker. Tip over switch Easy wall installation including a set of bracket and fixing. Adjustable Power Settings 800w, 1200w, 2000w Castor Wheels Belaco Oil filled heater 1x Heater 4x Castor 1x Fixing 1x Instruction manual Specification Oil heating elements Adjustable Thermostat Rated Power - 2000W Voltage - 200-240V 50Hz Equipped with a very safe overheat protection SAFETY To avoid extreme heat generation, burnt, shock or plug spark and other fire hazard it is highly prohibited to use multiple devices in the same circuit Also, to avoid short-circuiting of the power supply due to poor circuit contact, it is highly recommended to use this product with extra caution if the ageing electrical sockets are being use to plug this product
